details.message: reports/board/ directory does not exist. Expected top-level reports/board/ per governance contract.
reports/board/ directory is missing. Governance contract requires reports/audit/ and reports/board/ to exist.

Moltbot code remains in repo: moltbot/ directory (5 Python files: sentinel.py, promotion_discipline.py, orchestrator.py, memory_evolution.py, board.py), scripts/run_openclaw_molt_synthesis.py, scripts/run_molt_workflow.py, scripts/run_molt_intelligence_expansion.py, scripts/sre/run_sre_anomaly_scan.py (contains moltbot reference), scripts/automations/run_governance_integrity_once.py (contains moltbot reference). These are code/config files, not audit/docs documenting removal.
